title: osmanthus lanceolatus
intro: Osmanthus lanceolatus, also known as sweet osman, is a flowering plant native to China and Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Oleaceae. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Osmanthus lanceolatus include its ability to reduce stress, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Osmanthus lanceolatus is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in aromatherapy for its calming and relaxing effects.
